skillList.name: Muscle Workout
skillList.techniqueSummary:
* Be focused with each exercise 
* Try to beat your last result 
* Don't cheat and keep clean technique
skillList.description: The Muscle Workout is designed to increase your general strength and to build muscles. You shouldn't only work on skills but also always on the basics fitting your level. It is all about the sets and reps!

progressions.name: Beginner
progressions.description: Full body workout to increase muscle size and strength.

progressions.name: Intermediate
progressions.description: Full body workout to increase muscle size and strength.

skillList.name: Leg Workout
skillList.techniqueSummary:
* Be focused with each exercise 
* Try to beat your last result 
* Don't cheat and keep clean technique
skillList.description: The Leg Workout is designed to increase your general strength and to build muscles in your lower body. Training the lower body is very important. It consists of big muscle which will generate a lot of testosterone. This will increase also the muscle growth in the whole body. You shouldn't only work on skills like the Pistol Squat, but also always on the basics fitting your level. It is all about the sets and reps!

progressions.name: Beginner
progressions.description: Leg workout to increase muscle size and strength.

progressions.name: Intermediate
progressions.description: Leg workout to increase muscle size and strength.

skillList.name: Planche/Front Lever
skillList.techniqueSummary:
* Be focused with each exercise 
* Try to beat your last result 
* Don't cheat and keep clean technique
skillList.description: This Workout hits the whole upper body and focuses on achieving the Planche and Front Lever. These two skills are complementary and can be trained together. The exercises alternate between the Planche progressions and Front Lever progressions in order to reduce the workout time while ensuring enough rest for each muscle group.

progressions.name: Beginner
progressions.description: Superset to improve Planche and Front Lever with optimized rest times.

progressions.name: Intermediate
progressions.description: Superset to improve Planche and Front Lever with optimized rest times.

progressions.name: Advanced
progressions.description: Superset to improve Planche and Front Lever with optimized rest times.

skillList.description: The Upper Body Workout contains fundamental exercises and is focused on gaining muscles and strength.

progressions.name: Beginner
progressions.description: Basic upper body exercises to build strength and muscle.

skillList.name: Upper Body Circle
skillList.techniqueSummary:
* Be focused with each exercise 
* Try to beat your last result 
* Don't cheat and keep clean technique
skillList.description: The Upper Body Circle is a round based workout, which contains basic upper body exercises. The goal is to improve muscle endurance. Therefore keep always clean technique, but try to reduce rest time to a minimum and to complete the workout as quick as possible. The workout can nicely be added after Skill/Strength work to increase volume.

progressions.name: Beginner
progressions.description: Upper body circle with 10 rounds to increase endurance.

progressions.name: Intermediate
progressions.description: Upper body circle with 10 rounds to increase endurance.

skillList.name: Core Workout
skillList.techniqueSummary:
* Be focused with each exercise 
* Try to beat your last result 
* Don't cheat and keep clean technique
skillList.description: The Core Workout can be done additionally after most workouts or just when you feel like it. A well defined selection of exercises will ensure to target your whole core (rectus, obliques, serratus).

progressions.name: Beginner
progressions.description: Complete Core Workout for Beginners

progressions.name: Intermediate
progressions.description: Complete Core Workout for Intermediates

progressions.name: Advanced
progressions.description: Complete Core Workout for Advanced

skillList.name: Ring Workouts
skillList.techniqueSummary:
* Be focused with each exercise 
* Try to beat your last result 
* Don't cheat and keep clean technique
skillList.description: Rings are a great tool to work on your upper body! There is a workout from Beginner to Advanced. It will include the most important basic exercises for Push and Pull. A nice extension to these workouts is an additional Ring Core Workout at the end.

progressions.name: Beginner Upper Body
progressions.goalText: Focus on stable execution and try to progress in reps step by step.
progressions.description: Upper Body Ring Workout for Beginners

progressions.name: Intermediate Upper Body
progressions.goalText: Focus on stable execution and try to progress in reps step by step.
progressions.description: Upper Body Ring Workout for Intermediates

progressions.name: Advanced Upper Body
progressions.goalText: Focus on stable execution and try to progress in reps step by step.
progressions.description: Upper Body Ring Workout for Advanced

progressions.name: Core Workout with Rings
progressions.goalText: Focus on stable execution and try to progress in reps step by step.
progressions.description: Core Workout with Rings

progressions.name: Leg Workout with Rings
progressions.goalText: Focus on stable execution and try to progress in reps step by step.
progressions.description: Leg Workout with Rings

skillList.name: Band Workouts
skillList.techniqueSummary:
* Be focused with each exercise 
* Try to beat your last result 
* Don't cheat and keep clean technique
skillList.description: Resistance Bands are a very versatile tool. You can integrate Resistance Bands into your regular skill training, in order to get some support and to bridge the gap between progressions. Bands can also be used on travel, for rehabilitation, for beginner or deload workout. Here you will find a full body workout with bands. Increase the difficulty with stronger bands when needed.

progressions.name: Beginner Full Body
progressions.goalText: Focus on stable execution and try to progress in reps step by step.
progressions.description: Resistance Band Workout for Beginners
